pom.xml.general_idea: Rename the project group ID from co.com.gsdd to com.gsdd.
Bump the project artifact version to 2.0.1.
Add explicit JSTL dependency for runtime support.
Remove JUnit Vintage engine exclusion to modernize test execution or fix compatibility.
Configure Maven Surefire plugin for unit test execution.
Configure Maven Failsafe plugin for integration test execution.
Configure JaCoCo plugin for code coverage reporting.
Add code formatting plugin using Google style.
Configure dependency plugin to copy Lombok during packaging.

README.md.general_idea: Document the addition of internationalization support to the service.
Provide the local URL to access the service index.
Add documentation for building and running the service via Docker.
README.md.human_impl: docker build -t earthquake-svc . && docker run --rm -d -p 8092:8092 earthquake-svc

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Rename the Spring Boot application name to reflect a new service identity.
Update the servlet context path to match the new service name.
Change the server listening port from 8080 to 8092.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/foote.general_idea: Removed hardcoded links to Twitter, Facebook, and Blogspot from the footer.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/foote.human_impl: Deleted <a> tags for Twitter, Facebook, and Blogspot.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/foote.general_idea: Updated the YouTube link to point to a new channel URL.
Replaced hardcoded 'Siguenos en:' text with an i18n message key.
Cleaned up commented-out PayPal donation form code.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/foote.human_impl: Removed HTML comment block containing PayPal form inputs.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/foote.general_idea: Cleaned up commented-out YouTube subscription widget code.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/foote.human_impl: Removed HTML comment block containing YouTube iframe widget.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/menu..general_idea: Rename JSF form and component IDs to reflect the new English naming convention for earthquakes.
Update JSF expressions to reference the renamed backing bean and its properties.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/menu..human_impl: beanSismos -> earthquakeBean, minMagnitud -> minMagnitude, dias -> days

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/menu..general_idea: Replace hardcoded Spanish text with internationalization message bundle keys.
Update PayPal donation button configuration with new hosted button ID and correct target attribute.
Internationalize the PayPal button alt text and update image URLs to English locale.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/extensions/menu..human_impl: alt="PayPal..." -> alt="#{msg['paypal.alt']}", src updated to en_US/en_CO paths

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/faces-config.xml.general_idea: Configure JSF to use a resource bundle for internationalization support.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.general_idea: Standardize indentation from spaces to tabs for consistent code style.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.human_impl: Changed leading spaces to tabs in XML elements.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/template.xhtml.general_idea: Rename layout component ID to better reflect its content (Earthquakes).
Update favicon reference to a new file name.
Externalize the page title to support internationalization.

src/main/webapp/index.xhtml.general_idea: Replace hardcoded Spanish strings with EL expressions referencing a message bundle for internationalization support.
Rename JSF component IDs and bean references from Spanish ('sismo', 'beanSismos') to English ('earthquake', 'earthquakeBean') to align with the new naming convention.
Remove the embedded YouTube subscription widget iframe from the main container.
Update data exporter components to target the renamed table ID and use i18n keys for filenames.
Update the detail dialog to use the new English bean properties and i18n keys for labels and titles.
Rename PrimeFaces widget variables and dialog IDs to match the new English naming scheme.
